name: OpenLyst iOS Apps
subtitle: Free and open source iOS applications
description: A curated collection of free and open source iOS applications from OpenLyst.

apps.name: Doudou Beta
apps.subtitle: Pre-release builds - test upcoming features
apps.localizedDescription: Doudou is a music player for self-hosted libraries. Connect Jellyfin, Plex, or Navidrome and listen from your own servers.

versions.localizedDescription:
# 19.0.0

- settings panels are now scrollable.
- adds a new radio mode for youtube music
- Ensure other servers cant effect other servers 
- Youtube music will show some songs if you got nothing added 
- fix the desktop bottom bar favorite button not updaing when cliekd until state refershed
- The navbar action are now centred
- Swithing servers will cancle the current queue
